message.content:
{
  "competency_groups": [
    {
      "code": "C1",
      "title": "Equilibrium Competencies",
      "description": "Competencies derived from the Equilibrium chapter covering dynamic equilibrium, thermodynamic relationships, and factors affecting equilibria.",
      "competencies": [
        "Analyze dynamic equilibrium in physical and chemical processes",
        "Relate reaction quotient (Q), equilibrium constant (K), and Gibbs energy to predict spontaneity",
        "Evaluate the impact of external factors on chemical equilibria"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Equilibrium",
      "chapter_name": "Equilibrium"
    },
    {
      "code": "C1",
      "title": "Redox Reactions Competencies",
      "description": "Competencies derived from the Redox Reactions chapter focusing on electron transfer and oxidation states.",
      "competencies": [
        "Identify redox reactions based on electron transfer mechanisms",
        "Determine oxidation numbers to balance chemical equations",
        "Explain electrode processes in electrochemical cells"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Redox Reactions",
      "chapter_name": "Redox Reactions"
    },
    {
      "code": "C1",
      "title": "Organic Chemistry Principles Competencies",
      "description": "Competencies derived from the Organic Chemistry chapter covering nomenclature, isomerism, and reaction mechanisms.",
      "competencies": [
        "Classify organic compounds and apply IUPAC nomenclature rules",
        "Distinguish between different types of isomers in organic structures",
        "Analyze fundamental concepts underlying organic reaction mechanisms"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Organic Chemistry: Some basic Principles and Techniques",
      "chapter_name": "Some basic Principles and Techniques"
    },
    {
      "code": "C1",
      "title": "Hydrocarbons Competencies",
      "description": "Competencies derived from the Hydrocarbons chapter addressing classification, properties of aromatic compounds, and safety.",
      "competencies": [
        "Differentiate between alkanes, alkenes, and alkynes based on structure and reactivity",
        "Identify characteristics of aromatic hydrocarbons",
        "Assess carcinogenicity and toxicity associated with specific hydrocarbon classes"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Hydrocarbons",
      "chapter_name": "Hydrocarbons"
    }
  ]
}
